title: Taste the EvaCrew
wikitext:
[]: Taste the EvaCrew             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 19, 2009 10:37 pm Ever wondered what Rei tastes like? (Answer- Milk) Or Asuka? (Answer- Strawberry) And what kind of deliciousness would you get with the new girl Mari? (Answer- ...Raisin?) Well now you can with flavored Evangelion Bread! http://afufu.net/freewill/2009/06/evangelion-bread/ P.S. I think Kaworu's a bit confused cause he tastes of Chocolate.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Fri Jun 19, 2009 10:44 pm Why the hell would anyone want Bread that tastes like Milk? I can understand the others, but Milk? If I wanted to taste Milk, I'd drink it.

[]: Re: Taste the EvaCrew             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Fri Jun 19, 2009 10:47 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: P.S. I think Kaworu's a bit confused cause he tastes of Chocolate.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 19, 2009 10:49 pm Damn you gluten intolerance! Damn you!!! Anyway, the containers are very cool, at any rate. (Chocolate Kaworu sounds yummy. Stupid gluten. And I bet somebody will take this out of context.)

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Fri Jun 19, 2009 10:55 pm edit: I missed the point. Apparently Milk Bread is REGULAR bread. I've never heard it ever referred to as "Milk Bread".

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Jun 20, 2009 12:34 am Raisin and Mari seems to fit. She will be raisin' a lot of things around the trousers of fanboys ha. ha ha. Shinji is "honey lemon"? Weird. I wonder what a Gendo bread would taste like? "Spotted dick"? I'm on a roll. Together, they taste like orange. Is that a reference to tanging before Instrumentality? Witty. The ways they are milking the franchise never cease to amaze me. 


[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Jun 20, 2009 12:40 am I can't wait to taste them all, I will finally know what Rei taste like and I can stop biting my cosplay friend.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jun 20, 2009 2:09 am A distinct lack of salty milk and coins in this thread

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Jun 20, 2009 7:02 am

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sat Jun 20, 2009 7:03 am I likes my women how I likes my bread. Full of yeast. Damn you Tines for getting there before me!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jun 20, 2009 7:46 am Misato would taste like a bottle of Jack Daniels. Ritsuko would taste like a pack of cigarettes. Maya would taste like... syrup? Sailor Star Dust wrote: Chocolate Kaworu sounds yummy.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sat Jun 20, 2009 8:10 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: Maya would taste like... syrup?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat Jun 20, 2009 10:53 am Misato would taste like beer and Tabasco Ritsuko taste like cigarettes (agreeing with ThePRPD) Maya would taste like extra virgin olive oil Gendo would taste like horseradish because he's powerful and cruel, and salt from the tears of all the misery he's caused Keel would taste like various old man creams and ointments

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jun 20, 2009 11:43 am Misato- Tastes of beer and instant noodles mixed with other microwaveable crap. Kaji- Tastes of...melons? Ritsuko- Cigarettes & Coffee, great for a college budget Gendo- Tastes of .... um.... liver & onions? Fuytusuki- Tastes of prunes Maya- Tastes of sugar. Really sweet Toji- Tastes like a sweaty jockstrap Kensuke- Tastes of failure Hiakri- Caramel. Now there's a sweetie Yui- Tastes of blood. Hyuga- Lick your keyboard. That's the taste. Aoba- Tastes of Old Spice

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jun 20, 2009 11:48 am Timstuff wrote: Keel would taste like various old man creams and ointments

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat Jun 20, 2009 12:25 pm Oddly enough, the bread with all the characters on the can is orange flavored, and so is Tang. Symbolism!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jun 20, 2009 1:39 pm Except in Rebuild tang is no longer existent. It is now Hawaiian Punch .

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Jun 20, 2009 2:21 pm and i thought canned bread was already ridiculous

[]:             Quote Post by PuppetChaos » Sat Jun 20, 2009 4:13 pm And I thought Rei Doritos were absurd. Except in Rebuild tang is no longer existent. It is now Hawaiian Punch.
